prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年约第120–122名，2026年回升至第120名，排名稳定，属全国中上游水平；声誉文件2026年未收录该校负面或正面舆情；抖 音热度排名第95，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量较低；近年无投档线断档或异常记录，报考心理较为平稳；食品科学与工程为A-学科（第五轮学科评估），是该 校唯一A-及以上学科，与食品科学与工程类、食品科学与工程（拔尖人才培养班）等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气 工程及其自动化等社会热度持续高热，但该校相关专业招生规模较小；本省2026年普通高考总人数154000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计116360人增长约32.3%，考生规模大幅增 加，竞争显著加剧；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在内蒙古招生占比约2.5%（2025年140/5575），属跨省招生；东北地区高校在 内蒙古考生中地域偏好一般，无明显加分或减分效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移的大趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（–7.3%）以及本省考生总数大幅增长（+32.3%） 三个关键因素：考生规模激增是2026年最突出的竞争推手，其效应远超缩招带来的位次前移作用，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准25237名基础上，经供需弹性计算后进 一步微幅后移；预测最低位次约24436名，区间23936–24936名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 15641 → 15771 → 22507 → 25930 → 25237. In 2021–2022, it remained stable around 15600–15800, then significantly dropped to 22507 in 2023, further dropped to 25930 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 25237 in 2025. Over the past three years, the cumulative drop is about 9600 positions, showing a clear downward trend, with a baseline of approximately 25237 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 106 in 2021, 103 in 2022, 103 in 2023, 110 in 2024, and 110 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 102, a decrease of 8 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.3%, which typically makes the ranking number smaller (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In recent years, its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been around 120–122, rising to 120 in 2026, indicating stable performance at the upper-middle level nationally. The reputation file for 2026 does not include negative or positive public opinion about the university. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 95, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure. There have been no abnormal admission cutoff drops or records in recent years, and the application psychology is relatively stable. Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Science and Engineering (Top Talent Training Class), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially hot majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular, but the university's enrollment in related majors is relatively small. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is 154,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to the 2025 total of 116,360 (Physics + History categories), leading to significantly intensified competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and its enrollment share in Inner Mongolia is about 2.5% (140/5575 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Northeast universities generally have average regional preference among Inner Mongolian candidates, with no obvious bonus or penalty effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the major trend of continuous ranking decline over the years, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (–7.3%), and the substantial increase in the number of provincial candidates (+32.3%), the surge in candidate numbers is the most prominent competitive driver in 2026, far outweighing the ranking improvement effect from enrollment reduction. It is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will further slightly decline from the 2025 baseline of 25237, after supply-demand elasticity calculations. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24436, with a range of 23936–24936.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Food Science and Engineering (Top Talent Training Class)
- Veterinary Medicine (Top Talent Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation

- Food Science and Engineering
- Smart Agriculture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Animal Production (including Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Plant Production (including Agronomy, Seed Science and Engineering)
- Chemical Biology
- Applied Chemistry
- Animal Science (China-US 121 Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23936–24936, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23900), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Electrical and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (outside 24900), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 agriculture and forestry majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2779 → 4247 → 2726 → 5264 → 4585, with significant fluctuations: 2779 in 2021, a large drop to 4247 in 2022, a rebound to 2726 in 2023, another drop to 5264 in 2024, and a slight rebound to 4585 in 2025; the recent 3 years show a fluctuating downward trend, with a baseline of about 4585 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 6.7%, which typically makes the ranking number smaller (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 120th in the Soft Science Ranking, at the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation file for 2026 does not include negative or positive public opinion about the school; Douyin popularity ranking is 95th, rated as 'average'; no recent abnormal records of admission cutoff lines or gaps, and the application psychology is relatively stable. Food Science and Engineering A- is the only A- or above discipline at the school, and the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, Finance, Chinese International Education, etc.) are not directly related to this discipline, so the advantage discipline has limited driving effect on the application for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see, Finance is divided and wait-and-see; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is 154,000, an increase of about 32% from the 32,644 History Category students in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified competition; the school is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and accounts for about 2.5% of enrollment in Inner Mongolia, which is cross-provincial enrollment; the regional preference for universities in Northeast China among Inner Mongolia candidates is average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the three key factors of the fluctuating downward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (–6.7%), and the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates (+32%): the surge in the number of candidates is the most prominent competitive driver in 2026, far outweighing the ranking advancement effect brought by the enrollment reduction. It is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be slightly lower than the 2025 baseline of 4585, calculated through supply-demand elasticity; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4462, with a range of 3962–4962.
